# Postwerk

> Postwerk is an email-automation SaaS (German "E-Mail-Automatisierung"). Connect a
> mailbox, build a visual, node-based automation on a canvas, and let every incoming
> email be classified, have data extracted, be filtered, replied to, labeled, or pushed
> to an external HTTP API — automatically. An AI assistant can build automations from a
> plain-language description, a marketplace lets users share them, and AI features are
> powered by Google Gemini.

## Getting started

- [Welcome](/docs-content/en/getting-started/welcome.md): what Postwerk is and what you can build
- [Quickstart](/docs-content/en/getting-started/quickstart.md): build your first automation end to end
- [Connect a mailbox](/docs-content/en/getting-started/connect-mailbox.md): link an IMAP/OAuth inbox

## Core concepts

- [How automations work](/docs-content/en/core-concepts/how-automations-work.md): runs, nodes, handles, variables
- [Branches & handles](/docs-content/en/core-concepts/branches.md): how decision nodes split a run
- [Variables & expressions](/docs-content/en/developer/expressions.md): the {{namespace.field}} syntax

## Building & operating

- [Building with the AI assistant](/docs-content/en/ai-assistant/building-with-ai.md)
- [Test cases & assertions](/docs-content/en/testing/test-cases.md): dry-run tests, mocks, simulations
- [Knowledge bases](/docs-content/en/resources/knowledge-base.md): org reference data for the Knowledge match node
- [Marketplace](/docs-content/en/marketplace/publishing.md): install or publish automations
- [Members & permissions](/docs-content/en/teams/roles-permissions.md): organizations, per-mailbox grants, AI quota
- [Triggering via webhook](/docs-content/en/developer/api.md): start runs from your own code

## Automation nodes (the building blocks)

- Trigger: starts a run from incoming email, an inbound webhook, or a schedule.
- Filter: continues only when condition checks match (OR between groups, AND within).
- Categorize: AI routing — assigns one of your categories with a confidence score (Gemini).
- Extract: AI extraction — pulls structured fields from free-text email into variables (Gemini).
- Knowledge match (vector search): matches a value against a knowledge base via hybrid search + an AI judge.
- Add label / Remove label: assign or remove a category on the email.
- Email action: reply, forward, or move the triggering email.
- Send email: send a brand-new message to any recipient.
- Webhook: call an external HTTP API and expose the response as variables.
- Delay: pause a run for a set duration.
- Integration call / Input / Output: invoke and define reusable trigger-less "integration" sub-flows.
